sources.name: Extended Malaysian Traffic Sign Dataset
sources.geographic_relevance: Malaysia; 66 traffic-sign categories, 1,413 road-scene images, and 2,870 annotated instances.
sources.attribution: Extended Malaysian Traffic Sign Dataset, Reilly, Clancy, Foy, and Madden, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.1217105, CC BY 4.0.
restrictions: Credit the dataset creators and DOI 10.5281/zenodo.1217105.
Preserve original labels until the class mapping is independently reviewed.
sources.notes: Zenodo archive EMTD.zip; published 2018-04-11. The ground-truth CSV and ZIP central directory were extracted with verified byte ranges before the balanced image subset transfer.

sources.name: Malaysia Road Sign Dataset
sources.archive_url: Roboflow authenticated browser export: YOLOv8 zip
sources.geographic_relevance: Malaysia; public project page reports 62 classes, 9,483 original images, and a 23,068-image augmented version.
sources.attribution: Malaysia Road Sign Dataset, Malaysia Road Sign, Roboflow Universe, CC BY 4.0.
restrictions: The project owner must authenticate and initiate the export.
Review original versus augmented images and prevent derivative leakage across splits.
Preserve Roboflow project attribution.
sources.notes: Downloaded through owner-authenticated Chrome session on 2026-06-27 as YOLOv8. Staged through scripts/import_roboflow_stage_c.py with tiny-crop, duplicate, non-sign, and noisy-source exclusions. Source labels Pass either side and Roadway diverges were excluded because visual audit showed mixed classes.

sources.name: Malaysia's Road Sign
sources.licence_name: Public Domain / CC0 1.0 according to public project metadata
sources.archive_url: Roboflow authenticated browser export: folder classification zip
sources.geographic_relevance: Malaysia road-sign classification dataset; public project page reports 844 images and 34 classes.
sources.attribution: Malaysia's Road Sign Dataset, Dr Samsudin, Roboflow Universe, Public Domain/CC0 1.0.
restrictions: Preserve Roboflow source metadata and public-domain citation.
Do not merge public mixed source data into final training without Stage D/freeze audit.
sources.notes: Downloaded through owner-authenticated Chrome session on 2026-06-27 as folder classification export. Selekoh class was excluded because it mixes left/right chevrons under one direction-losing label.

sources.name: Stage C Sprint 01 Curated Wikimedia Commons Top-Up
sources.archive_url: Wikimedia Commons API curated per-file downloads
sources.geographic_relevance: Curated public files for near-minimum Malaysian road-sign classes, including Malaysia-specific reference graphics and real Malaysian keep-right photos.
sources.attribution: Use per-file Commons title, URL, licence, artist, and credit fields from data/manifests/stage_c_sprint_01_commons_candidates.csv.
restrictions: Do not use a blanket licence statement; attribution is per file.
Downloaded candidates require Stage D visual QC/annotation and Stage E split freeze before final training.
Downloaded_excluded and failed rows in the manifest must not be counted as usable training data.
sources.notes: Small controlled top-up for no_overtaking, keep_right, and no_heavy_vehicle. One no_overtaking candidate was excluded after visual QC because it was heavy-vehicle no-overtaking, not generic no-overtaking.

sources.name: Stage C Sprint 02 Synthetic Near-Minimum Top-Up
sources.owner: Generated by project scripts from reviewed candidate seeds
sources.licence_name: Derived from seed image licences; see seed_path and seed_source in data/manifests/stage_c_sprint_02_synthetic_candidates.csv
sources.geographic_relevance: Synthetic support samples for near-minimum Malaysian road-sign classes based on P5-cleaned Malaysian crops and one Commons candidate.
sources.attribution: Use seed-level attribution from each seed source; synthetic output rows record seed_path and seed_source.
restrictions: Do not treat generated samples as real camera/demo coverage.
Keep seed-derived generated candidates leakage-safe if used in experiments.
Exclude from final realistic dataset coverage metrics.
Use outputs/audit/post_stage_c_realistic_gap_report.* for current coverage decisions.
sources.notes: Generated 5 side_road_right and 7 no_heavy_vehicle candidates. After 2026-06-28 policy correction, these are reference-only and do not close final realistic gaps.

sources.name: Stage C Sprint 03 Mandatory Direction Symbol Candidates
sources.geographic_relevance: Project-owned reference-symbol support for assignment mandatory direction classes with zero existing candidate data.
sources.attribution: Generated locally; no external image source.
restrictions: Do not treat generated samples as real camera/demo coverage.
Exclude from final realistic dataset coverage metrics.
Supplement with local camera examples before final presentation claims.
Use outputs/audit/post_stage_c_realistic_gap_report.* for current coverage decisions.
sources.notes: Generated 50 candidates each for straight_ahead, turn_left, and turn_right. After 2026-06-28 policy correction, these are reference-only and do not close final realistic gaps.

sources.name: Stage C Sprint 04 Compound Mandatory Symbol Candidates
sources.geographic_relevance: Project-owned reference-symbol support for compound mandatory direction classes and pass_either_side.
sources.attribution: Generated locally; no external image source.
restrictions: Do not treat generated samples as real camera/demo coverage.
Exclude from final realistic dataset coverage metrics.
Supplement with real or official-reference samples where possible.
Use outputs/audit/post_stage_c_realistic_gap_report.* for current coverage decisions.
sources.notes: Generated 50 candidates each for straight_or_right, turn_left_or_right, and roundabout_mandatory, plus 40 candidates for pass_either_side. After 2026-06-28 policy correction, these are reference-only and do not close final realistic gaps.

sources.name: Stage C Sprint 05 Prohibitory Direction Symbol Candidates
sources.geographic_relevance: Project-owned reference-symbol support for zero-data prohibitory direction assignment classes.
sources.attribution: Generated locally; no external image source.
restrictions: Do not treat generated samples as real camera/demo coverage.
Exclude from final realistic dataset coverage metrics.
Review slash placement and arrow legibility only if used for UI/testing experiments.
Use outputs/audit/post_stage_c_realistic_gap_report.* for current coverage decisions.
sources.notes: Generated 50 candidates each for no_straight_or_left, no_straight_or_right, and no_left_or_right_turn. After 2026-06-28 policy correction, these are reference-only and do not close final realistic gaps.

sources.name: Stage C Sprint 06 Warning Symbol References
sources.geographic_relevance: Project-owned warning-symbol references for bicycle_crossing, school_zone, steep_descent, and uneven_road.
sources.attribution: Generated locally; no external image source.
restrictions: Do not treat generated samples as real camera/demo coverage.
Exclude from final realistic dataset coverage metrics.
Use only for UI, rule, OCR, or augmentation experiments with limitations documented.
Use outputs/audit/post_stage_c_realistic_gap_report.* for current coverage decisions.
sources.notes: Generated 50 candidates each for bicycle_crossing, school_zone, steep_descent, and uneven_road. User review judged the generated style too fake/unrealistic for final coverage.

sources.name: Stage C Sprint 07 Regulatory And Text Symbol References
sources.geographic_relevance: Project-owned regulatory/text references for motor_vehicles_only, no_lane_changing, no_motor_vehicles, slow_text, sound_horn, stop_for_checking, and width_restriction.
sources.attribution: Generated locally; no external image source.
restrictions: Do not treat generated samples as real camera/demo coverage.
Exclude from final realistic dataset coverage metrics.
Do not use as final proof for OCR or multilingual text recognition.
Use outputs/audit/post_stage_c_realistic_gap_report.* for current coverage decisions.
sources.notes: Generated 50 candidates each for motor_vehicles_only, no_lane_changing, no_motor_vehicles, slow_text, sound_horn, and stop_for_checking, plus 49 for width_restriction. User review judged the generated style too fake/unrealistic for final coverage.

sources.name: Stage C Online Reference Sources 01
sources.owner: Per-file Wikimedia Commons contributors and HuggingFace dataset metadata
sources.licence_name: Mixed per-file Wikimedia Commons licences recorded in data/manifests/stage_c_online_reference_sources_01.csv
sources.archive_url: Curated per-file Wikimedia Commons downloads via Commons API; HuggingFace rows used to identify Wikimedia-hosted Malaysian references.
sources.geographic_relevance: Malaysian road-sign diagrams/SVGs from Wikimedia Commons and Wikimedia-linked HuggingFace metadata for remaining Stage C gap classes.
sources.attribution: Use per-file Commons title, URL, licence, artist, and credit fields from data/manifests/stage_c_online_reference_sources_01.csv.
restrictions: Do not treat reference diagrams as real road-scene photo coverage.
Do not use a blanket licence statement; attribution is per file.
Use as class anchors, review references, and controlled experiment input only unless a later evaluation proves value.
Keep downloaded possible-mismatch rows out of final claims unless manually approved.
sources.notes: Downloaded 15 online reference candidates across 12 classes. High-confidence references were found for 11 classes; motor_vehicles_only was downgraded to possible mismatch after visual review. These references are more reliable than locally generated fake signs but still do not close realistic-photo coverage gaps by themselves.

sources.name: Stage C China/GB Reference Sources 01
sources.owner: Per-file Wikimedia Commons contributors / listed public-domain authorities
sources.licence_name: Public domain per downloaded Commons metadata, recorded per file in data/manifests/stage_c_china_reference_sources_01.csv
sources.archive_url: Curated per-file Wikimedia Commons downloads via Commons API.
sources.geographic_relevance: China/GB-style warning, prohibitory, and indicative sign diagrams that match rare assignment-style road signs not covered well by Malaysian public road-scene datasets.
sources.attribution: Use per-file Commons title, URL, licence, artist, and credit fields from data/manifests/stage_c_china_reference_sources_01.csv.
restrictions: Do not treat reference diagrams as real road-scene photo coverage.
Do not use a blanket licence statement; attribution and public-domain authority are per file.
Use as class anchors, review references, and controlled experiment input only unless a later evaluation proves value.
Keep motor_vehicles_only marked as a possible style difference until compared against the assignment source image.
Do not force-map no_lane_changing until an exact standalone sign-board source is verified.
sources.notes: Downloaded 19 China/GB-style online reference candidates across 19 classes. Visual contact sheet review found 18 high-confidence class anchors and one medium-confidence possible style difference for motor_vehicles_only. These references replace the unreliable generated-fake approach for rare assignment signs but still do not close realistic-photo coverage gaps by themselves.
